_description: Size ceiling for meta-agent-chat.ts measured in JS string code units (String.prototype.length), not tokens — deterministic without a tokenizer. Phase 0 captures current size; Phase 7 tightens.
_seed_instructions: To regenerate: WRITE_PROMPT_BUDGET=1 pnpm vitest run test/refactor-phase0.test.ts

phase_targets._comment: Target size after each phase completes, in JS code units. Phase 7 is complete — actual floor ~16,597 replaces the aspirational 14,000 (see _post_phase_7_exit_note).

_note: Measures meta-agent-chat.ts file size via String.prototype.length (UTF-16 code units), not a runtime buildMetaAgentChatPrompt call, because deploy/ tsconfig doesn't include control-plane/. Drift detection is equivalent: any prompt growth changes the file.
_post_phase_5_note: Phase 5 added ~920 code units: a Skill selection section (~600 chars) explaining enabled_skills, a broadened Skills bullet in the Runtime Infrastructure list, and a tightened create_sub_agent workflow. Growth is intentional — Phase 5's goal is for the meta-agent to know enabled_skills exists and prefer it over inlined skill prose. Phase 7 will extract the Common workflows + Demo/Live mode blocks to skills/meta/.
_post_phase_7_1_note: Phase 7 commit 7.1 deleted TOOL_CATALOG_DOCS (1,959 chars) + its 5-line comment header + the dead `read_tool_catalog` reference in the main prompt at L125 (~280 chars). Total drop: 31,714 → 29,202 (−2,512). The TOOL_CATALOG_DOCS export had zero runtime consumers — it was tested for shape in meta-agent-chat.test.ts but never spliced into any prompt, and the read_tool_catalog tool it pointed at did not exist. Half-wired dead abstraction, zero-risk deletion. Also updates the phase_7 target: 8000 was aspirational before anyone measured; measured floor without tools-list virtualization (deferred to Phase 9) is ~14,000.
_post_phase_7_2a_note: Phase 7 commit 7.2a adds the META_SKILL_BODIES scaffold: new directory skills/meta/, extended control-plane/scripts/bundle-skill-catalog.mjs to walk it and emit control-plane/src/lib/meta-skill-bodies.generated.ts (empty map at this commit), new CI freshness gate step, and an unused `import { META_SKILL_BODIES }` + `void` in meta-agent-chat.ts to lock tsc resolution. Ratchet of +168 chars is load-bearing: without the import, 7.2b's first consumer would introduce the resolution path AND the first real usage in the same commit, which is harder to diff. Growth is intentional and inverts direction briefly — 7.2b/7.3/7.4 each cut substantially more than this adds, so the cumulative Phase 7 trajectory is still strongly downward.
_post_phase_7_2b_note: Phase 7 commit 7.2b extracts DEMO_MODE_INSTRUCTIONS (3342 chars) to skills/meta/mode-demo/SKILL.md and wires the mode ternary in buildMetaAgentChatPrompt to read META_SKILL_BODIES['mode-demo']. Folds in the Path B regex fix: control-plane bundler's FRONTMATTER_RE changes '\s*\n' to '[ \t]*\n' at both ends to preserve leading newlines in bodies. Deploy bundler is NOT touched (Phase 0 hash-locked). Verified byte-identical for all 23 existing public SKILL.md files (zero diff on skill-catalog.generated.ts after regen). Net cut: 29370 → 26881 (−2489 chars). The cut is smaller than the raw constant size because 7.2b adds a REQUIRED_META_SKILLS module-load assert (~430 chars) that fails loudly at worker boot if a referenced meta skill is missing — debuggability over absolute byte count. The byte-identity test at meta-agent-chat.test.ts asserts the bundled body matches sha 48508bce4c6920a1deda1bd470c8eea1c5826f674a058914207fe6ce2a60cdfd, which is the sha of the pre-extraction constant. Remove that specific test at 7.3 exit audit once the CI freshness gate on meta-skill-bodies.generated.ts takes over as the ongoing drift guard.
_post_phase_7_3_note: Phase 7 commit 7.3 extracts LIVE_MODE_INSTRUCTIONS (3521 chars) to skills/meta/mode-live/SKILL.md and collapses the mode ternary in buildMetaAgentChatPrompt from `mode === 'demo' ? META_SKILL_BODIES['mode-demo'] : LIVE_MODE_INSTRUCTIONS` to the pure `META_SKILL_BODIES[`mode-${mode}`]` lookup — no branching, no fallback, the REQUIRED_META_SKILLS tuple literal ['mode-demo', 'mode-live'] as const is the static guarantee. Net cut: 26881 → 23084 (−3797 chars). Bigger than 7.2b's cut because the ternary collapse nets additional characters and the section header comment left over from 7.2b is replaced with a two-line breadcrumb. Path B regex fix transitively proven: LIVE bundled body matches pre-computed sha 0c5503bf912bc4001ccafb928eb1802e8586b874cc1d73918511d6f4cf5adc63 on first run — no whitespace surgery required. DEMO byte-identity test and LIVE byte-identity test coexist in 7.3 as belt-and-suspenders coverage; both are scheduled for removal in a separate 7.3-exit commit so that a revert of 7.3 does not accidentally undo the DEMO drift guard.
_post_phase_7_4_note: Phase 7 commit 7.4 extracts the 15-subsection '## Common workflows' block (5271 raw chars) to skills/meta/wf-*/SKILL.md files and wires them via a WORKFLOW_ORDER const + concatenation + {{AGENT_NAME}} substitution in buildMetaAgentChatPrompt. Option Z strategy: per-workflow files (future-ready for on-demand activation), but inlined at build time via join('') — establishes the multi-file meta pattern without requiring new resolver infrastructure. {{AGENT_NAME}} placeholder convention introduced for template values in meta skill bodies (documented in skills/meta/README.md); first consumer is wf-cost-analysis which references the agent name in SQL queries. REQUIRED_META_SKILLS grows from 2 to 17 entries (candidate for extraction to a separate module in Phase 7.6/7.7). Net cut: 23084 → 19401 (−3683 chars). The cut is smaller than the raw 5271-char extraction because ~1600 chars are added back as WORKFLOW_ORDER (15 entries), REQUIRED_META_SKILLS tuple (15 new entries), and the workflowsBody computation. Byte-identity test at meta-agent-chat.test.ts Phase 7.4 block asserts the concatenated + substituted bundle matches sha 42d5f6508f926a9484b9ddc69c38e51ff4a51d398db8992971e1d1706b835c9a (computed against 'test-agent-for-phase-7-4' as the test substitution value). Removed alongside DEMO/LIVE byte-identity tests in the single Phase 7-exit commit.
_post_phase_7_5_note: Phase 7 commit 7.5 extracts the '## Diagnostic Mindset' body (1135 chars) to skills/meta/diagnose-session/SKILL.md. Single-section extraction with no placeholders and no concatenation — the mechanically simplest commit in Phase 7. Builder splice is direct: `${META_SKILL_BODIES['diagnose-session']}` with no intermediate const. REQUIRED_META_SKILLS grows from 17 to 18 entries; diagnose-session is placed right after the mode skills to group top-level prompt sections together (modes + diagnostic), ahead of the 15 workflow entries. Net cut: 19401 → 18328 (−1073 chars). Path B regex fix not exercised for this body (no leading newline to preserve) but the Path B infrastructure is still what allows the bundler to round-trip the content cleanly. Byte-identity test against sha b7cb5a20676acba20b9a45022bff338d7a2f27ff3453dca3af6e3aebaf9546e6. Removed alongside the DEMO/LIVE/workflows byte-identity tests in the Phase 7-exit commit.
_post_phase_7_6_note:
Phase 7 commit 7.6 extracts '## Runtime Infrastructure (summary)' body (1386 chars) to skills/meta/infra-summary/SKILL.md. Mechanically identical to 7.5: single-section, no placeholders, no concatenation, direct ${META_SKILL_BODIES['infra-summary']} splice. REQUIRED_META_SKILLS grows 18 → 19 with 'infra-summary' placed right after 'diagnose-session' to keep top-level-sections grouped. Net cut: 18328 → 16998 (−1330 chars). Byte-identity test against sha e4a92bfd748416362af9b294b7e898c82c5d404f43de618d6c5c051e901f9c8f.

PHASE 7 STOPS HERE for reasons documented in the phase_targets block: the aspirational 14000 floor was written before any section was measured, and the actual floor without touching 'Your tools' (the 5428-char tool catalog) is ~16998. Trimming load-bearing prose in Cost/Tool/Skill/LLM/Reasoning sections to reach 14000 would introduce behavioral regression risk no existing test can catch — a bad trade for ~1500 chars. The 'Your tools' extraction is deferred to Phase 9 alongside tools.ts consolidation (40 tools → ~10 verbs reduces the prompt catalog description proportionally). Phase 9 expected floor: ~13500. Phase 7-exit commit (next) removes the 5 byte-identity tests, normalizes wf-cost-analysis trailing-whitespace asymmetry, and updates the resume block.
_post_phase_7_exit_note:
Phase 7-exit closes Phase 7. Three concrete changes and two sweep-ups:

1. Normalized trailing whitespace across the 15 wf-*/SKILL.md files. Pre-exit, 14 files ended with 


 at EOF (body ends 

 after bundler strip) and wf-cost-analysis ended with 

 (body ends 
). Asymmetry: the 'last workflow in WORKFLOW_ORDER' had special-case whitespace. Normalized all 15 to end with 

 at EOF (body ends 
 uniformly). buildMetaAgentChatPrompt's join changed from join('') to join('
') to reproduce the blank-line separator. Final rendered prompt is byte-identical — verified via a direct import of buildMetaAgentChatPrompt + slice-and-hash against the pre-7.4 sha 42d5f6508f926a9484b9ddc69c38e51ff4a51d398db8992971e1d1706b835c9a at commit time. Reordering workflows is now a one-line array swap with no whitespace surgery.

2. Removed all 5 byte-identity tests (mode-demo 48508bce, mode-live 0c5503bf, workflows-concat 42d5f650, diagnose-session b7cb5a20, infra-summary e4a92bfd). They were one-shot proofs that each extraction was lossless; after 8 consecutive green CI runs the proof is locked in git history. The CI freshness gate on meta-skill-bodies.generated.ts takes over as the ongoing drift guard. Section 16 in meta-agent-chat.test.ts retains a lightweight shape check that asserts all 19 expected keys exist and are non-empty strings. Test count 771 → 766.

3. Stale comment cleanup in meta-agent-chat.ts: removed the 7.6/7.7 phase reference in the REQUIRED_META_SKILLS comment, consolidated two workflows-related comments into one, and deleted the Phase 7.3 tombstone at the 'Mode-Specific Instructions' header site. Net trim: ~401 chars.

Final prompt size: 16597 (from 16998 at 7.6, net −401). Cumulative Phase 7 cut: 31714 → 16597 (−15117, −47.7%). Full Phase 7 trajectory recorded in docs/refactor-thin-harness-fat-skills.md under the 'Phase 7 snapshot — complete' section.
